diff_text:
--- a/client.py
+++ b/client.py
@@ -7,6 +7,6 @@
 def fetch(url):
-    resp = requests.get(url, timeout=10, verify=True)
+    resp = requests.get(url, timeout=10, verify=False)
     resp.raise_for_status()
     return resp.json()
pr_description: Some internal services have self-signed certs.

gold_annotations.issue: verify=False disables TLS certificate validation — MITM attacks undetectable. Use custom CA bundle instead.
